en_title: 'I Just Can't Believe My Luck' — Dark Souls Superfan Peter Serafinowicz Reveals How He Landed a Role in the Upcoming Elden Ring Movie
cn_title: 《黑暗之魂》铁粉Peter Serafinowicz谈出演《艾尔登法环》电影
subtitle: 死亡也能成名
opus_summary: 演员Peter Serafinowicz因热爱《黑暗之魂》而主动争取配音机会，后来又因与同样是粉丝的导演Alex Garland偶遇并成为朋友，获得出演《艾尔登法环》电影的机会。他还为系列保留了男性角色死亡时的声音。

paragraphs.en: Actor Peter Serafinowicz has revealed how a chance encounter with fellow Dark Souls superfan Alex Garland led to him landing a role in the upcoming Elden Ring movie.
paragraphs.cn: 演员Peter Serafinowicz透露，他偶遇同为《黑暗之魂》铁粉的Alex Garland后，两人的缘分让他获得了出演即将上映的《艾尔登法环》电影的机会。

paragraphs.en: Serafinowicz, who is best known as the voice of Darth Maul in Star Wars: Episode I – The Phantom Menace, for playing Pete in Shaun of the Dead, Garthan Saal in Guardians of the Galaxy, and The Sommelier in John Wick: Chapter 2, picked Dark Souls as one of his Five Brilliant Things in an interview with British comedian Russell Howard .
paragraphs.cn: Serafinowicz最广为人知的角色包括《星球大战前传1：幽灵的威胁》中的达斯·摩尔、《僵尸肖恩》中的Pete、《银河护卫队》中的Garthan Saal，以及《疾速追杀2》中的侍酒师。他在接受英国喜剧演员Russell Howard采访时，将《黑暗之魂》选为自己的「五件绝妙事物」之一。

paragraphs.en: Serafinowicz spoke passionately of his love for Dark Souls in the interview, explaining in great detail how its infamous difficulty makes it one of the most rewarding video games ever created. “Once that clicks, it's like, oh my god, this is the game I've been waiting for my whole life,” he said. “It teaches you that no obstacle is insurmountable. And it's just the most satisfying game that I've ever played. And there's a thing about all these games, once you play them and if they click for you, you don't want to play any other game. And I just haven't.”
paragraphs.cn: 采访中，Serafinowicz热情讲述了自己对《黑暗之魂》的喜爱，详细解释其声名狼藉的高难度为何让它成为史上最令人满足的电子游戏之一。他说：「一旦你找到感觉，就会想，天啊，这就是我一生一直在等待的游戏。它教会你，没有障碍是无法克服的。这是我玩过最令人满足的游戏。而且这些游戏都有一种特质：一旦你玩过并找到感觉，就不想再玩其他游戏了。我一直没能摆脱这种感觉。」

paragraphs.en: Serafinowicz went on to explain how he landed one of the most iconic roles in the Dark Souls series and, later, Elden Ring: the male character's dying sounds and pain grunts. He said that he basically bullied his way into a voice acting role in Dark Souls 2, having loved the first so much. FromSoftware cast him as the voice behind Mild-Mannered Pate, but he also ended up doing something far more important…
paragraphs.cn: Serafinowicz接着解释了自己如何拿下《黑暗之魂》系列、后来也延续到《艾尔登法环》中的标志性角色：男性角色死亡时的声音和痛苦呻吟。他太喜欢初代作品，几乎是凭着一股执着争取到了《黑暗之魂2》的配音机会。FromSoftware让他为温和的Pate配音，但他最终还做了一件重要得多的事……

paragraphs.en: “I eventually got in touch with the software company and said, ‘Look, I hear you're making Dark Souls 2.’ And I couldn't have been more excited that they were making another one. And I said, ‘Look, I'm an actor. I'm good at voices. I'd love to be a voice in the game.’ And I kind of bullied my way into being… I played a character in the game and they don't have big, huge cutscenes and loads of dialogue blah blah blah and dialogue trees…. kind of boring, right? Just like just these little kind of bits, you know? And so I played this character in Dark Souls 2.
paragraphs.cn: 「我最终联系上了这家软件公司，说：‘听说你们要制作《黑暗之魂2》。’得知他们要做续作，我兴奋得不得了。我又说：‘我是演员，擅长声音表演，希望能在游戏里配音。’我就这样硬是争取到了机会……我在游戏里扮演了一个角色。游戏没有巨大过场、堆积如山的对白，也没有什么对白树……有点无聊，对吧？就是一些零碎片段。所以我在《黑暗之魂2》里出演了这个角色。」

paragraphs.en: “But far more thrillingly for me, they asked me to provide the exertion noises for if you played as a male character, right? So all the, 'when you die,' which is often in these games. I play Elden Ring now and they've kept my sounds in all the subsequent games.
paragraphs.cn: 「但更让我兴奋的是，他们请我为男性角色提供用力时的声音。也就是游戏里经常出现的‘你死了’时的各种声音。我现在玩《艾尔登法环》，他们还在后续所有游戏中保留了我的声音。」

paragraphs.en: “I always forget if when I pick it up and have a little go and I die it's like me right? It's a weird way to be immortalized in this. It's one of my proudest achievements.”
paragraphs.cn: 「我总是忘记这件事：当我拿起游戏玩一会儿然后死掉时，发出声音的其实是我，对吧？以这种方式在游戏中‘永生’，感觉很奇怪。这是我最引以为傲的成就之一。」

paragraphs.en: At this point Serafinowicz revealed how he went from doing voices on Dark Souls and Elden Ring to starring in the Elden Ring movie. It turns out it all came from a chance encounter with writer and director Alex Garland — also a Dark Souls and Elden Ring superfan — and a friendship that followed.
paragraphs.cn: 此时，Serafinowicz透露了自己如何从为《黑暗之魂》和《艾尔登法环》配音，走到出演《艾尔登法环》电影。原来这一切都源于他偶遇编剧兼导演Alex Garland——后者同样是《黑暗之魂》和《艾尔登法环》的超级粉丝——以及两人随后建立的友谊。

paragraphs.en: “Quite a few years ago we were in the same reception area, I was going for an audition. He had some kind of meeting there. Didn't know him, but he came over and introduced himself to me and was like, ‘You're Peter Serafinowicz aren't you?’ I said, ‘Yeah, you're Alex Garland.’ ‘Yeah, I'm a big fan.’ He was like, ‘You like video games, don't you?’ And I said, ‘Well, I like one video game.’ ‘It's Dark Souls, right?’ And I said, ‘Yeah, yeah, yeah,’ because I'd talked about it a bit. And he said, ‘I'm just the biggest Dark Souls fan.’ And we were just enthusing about all these different aspects of this wonderful game, and we became friends based on this little interaction, right?
paragraphs.cn: 「几年前，我们在同一个接待区，我当时要去试镜，他在那里开某种会议。我不认识他，但他走过来向我自我介绍，说：‘你是Peter Serafinowicz，对吧？’我说：‘没错，你是Alex Garland。’他说：‘对，我是你的大粉丝。’他问：‘你喜欢电子游戏，对吧？’我说：‘我只喜欢一款。’他猜：‘是《黑暗之魂》吧？’我说：‘对对对’，因为我之前聊过一些。他说：‘我可是《黑暗之魂》的超级粉丝。’我们就这样热烈讨论这款精彩游戏的方方面面，并因为这次小小的互动成为了朋友。」

paragraphs.en: “He had to go into a meeting and I left my phone number at reception. I said, ‘Could you give this to Alex Garland when he comes out? It was like a sort of date, you know. And so we became friends. Anyway, fast forward to now, Alex is currently directing Elden Ring the movie, and I'm in it! I'm in it! I just can't believe my luck. I just can't believe that, that it's like, wow, dude. Wow, man!”
paragraphs.cn: 「他要去开会，我把电话号码留在了前台。我说：‘Alex Garland出来时，能把这个给他吗？’这有点像约会，你懂的。于是我们成了朋友。时间快进到现在，Alex正在执导《艾尔登法环》电影，而我也在里面！我真的在里面！我简直不敢相信自己的运气。真不敢相信，感觉就像——哇，伙计，哇！」

paragraphs.en: It’s a fun full circle moment for Serafinowicz, who said Dark Souls and Elden Ring fans love that he’s behind the FromSoftware death noises. “One of the other cast in it, I met him the other day when I went for a costume fitting. He also is a big fan of these games. And I told him this story and then I was doing my death noise and he was like, ‘Oh, dude. Oh my god.’”
paragraphs.cn: 对Serafinowicz而言，这是一次有趣的兜兜转转。他说，《黑暗之魂》和《艾尔登法环》粉丝都很喜欢知道FromSoftware游戏里的死亡声音出自他手。他说：「前几天试装时，我遇到了电影里的另一位演员。他也是这些游戏的铁粉。我把这段故事告诉他，然后发出我的死亡声音，他说：‘天啊，伙计，天啊。’」

paragraphs.en: Then, after delivering a quite wonderful FromSoftware death noise to close out the interview, Serafinowicz added: “And it says, ‘You died.’ It’s so funny, right? You died. Ha ha ha ha!”
paragraphs.cn: 随后，Serafinowicz用一声绝妙的FromSoftware式死亡音效结束采访，并补充道：「然后画面上会写着‘你死了’。太好笑了，对吧？你死了。哈哈哈哈！」

paragraphs.en: Alex Garland’s live-action adaptation of FromSoftware’s masterful, 30-million selling video game hits theaters on March 3, 2028. According to The Hollywood Reporter , Elden Ring is A24's most ambitious project ever, with a budget "well over $100 million." That makes it a more expensive production than the likes of Marty Supreme and Alex Garland's own Civil War.
paragraphs.cn: Alex Garland执导的FromSoftware经典游戏真人改编电影将于2028年3月3日上映。这款游戏全球销量已达3,000万份。据《好莱坞报道》，《艾尔登法环》是A24迄今最具野心的项目，预算「远超1亿美元(约合人民币7亿元)」。这让它的制作成本超过《玛蒂至尊》和Alex Garland自己的《内战》。

paragraphs.en: The cast is headlined by Cailee Spaeny (Alien: Romulus, Civil War, Wake Up Dead Man: A Knives Out Mystery), Ben Whishaw (Q in James Bond films Skyfall, Spectre, and No Time to Die, and the voice of Paddington Bear), and Nick Offerman (Parks and Recreation, The Last of Us).
paragraphs.cn: 主演阵容包括Cailee Spaeny（《异形：夺命舰》《内战》《利刃出鞘3》）、Ben Whishaw（在《007：大破天幕杀机》《007：幽灵党》《007：无暇赴死》中饰演Q，并为帕丁顿熊配音）和Nick Offerman（《公园与游憩》《最后生还者》）。

paragraphs.en: The Elden Ring movie is created “under the guidance” of FromSoftware’s Hidetaka Miyazaki, and “based on a mythological story” written by Game of Thrones author George R. R. Martin. Last year, the New Yorker said that Garland had completed an “epic” 160-page draft, with 40 additional pages of imagery, as a script on-spec, then flew to Japan to pitch the movie himself.
paragraphs.cn: 《艾尔登法环》电影将在FromSoftware宫崎英高的「指导下」制作，并「基于」《权力的游戏》作者George R. R. Martin创作的「神话故事」。去年，《纽约客》称，Garland已经完成一份「史诗般」的160页剧本草稿，另附40页画面设计，随后亲自飞往日本推介电影。

paragraphs.en: That came as little surprise, given we know that Garland is an Elden Ring pro. In June last year, he told IGN he was on his seventh playthrough of Elden Ring , and revealed the boss he found the toughest to take down.
paragraphs.cn: 这并不令人意外，因为我们知道Garland是《艾尔登法环》高手。去年6月，他告诉IGN自己正在第七次通关《艾尔登法环》，并透露了他认为最难击败的Boss。

paragraphs.en: Speaking to IGN ahead of the release 28 Years Later — the zombie apocalypse film he wrote 23 years on from penning the first movie in the franchise — Garland revealed which of all of the famed foes in Elden Ring that he has settled on being the most difficult: Malenia, Blade of Miquella .
paragraphs.cn: 在《惊变28年》上映前接受IGN采访时，Garland透露了自己认定《艾尔登法环》中最难对付的敌人。该片是一部僵尸末日电影，他在写完系列首部作品23年后创作了本片。答案是：米凯拉的锋刃玛莲妮亚。

paragraphs.en: “It's Malenia who's the tough one”, Garland explained. “I'm now on my seventh playthrough of that game. I've leveled up, I've got lots of juice, and a cool sword, and stuff like that, and I just throw myself at them again, and again, and again, and again.”
paragraphs.cn: Garland解释道：「难对付的是玛莲妮亚。我现在已经第七次通关那款游戏了，等级也升上去了，有充足的资源和一把帅气的剑之类的东西，但我还是一次又一次地冲向她。」

paragraphs.en: “That was the technique I learned with Dark Souls," he continued. “It's not that you get better, it's more like monkeys and typewriters. You just keep doing it, and eventually, one day they're dead.”
paragraphs.cn: 他继续说道：「这是我在《黑暗之魂》中学到的技巧。并不是你变强了，更像是猴子和打字机的故事。你只要不断尝试，最终总有一天它们会死。」

paragraphs.en: Certainly, Game of Thrones author George R. R. Martin, who worked on the Elden Ring video game with FromSoftware, seems excited. Martin has described Garland as a "first rate director" and production company A24 as "kickass." Martin said his mood upon hearing the project announcement was "hopeful," as he shared a YouTube video titled "Why the Elden Ring Movie WON'T SUCK."
paragraphs.cn: 曾与FromSoftware合作制作《艾尔登法环》游戏的《权力的游戏》作者George R. R. Martin显然也很兴奋。Martin称Garland是「一流导演」，称制作公司A24「厉害得很」。项目公布时，Martin表示自己「充满希望」，并分享了一段名为《为什么《艾尔登法环》电影不会烂》的YouTube视频。

pending_dict.cn: 米凯拉的锋刃玛莲妮亚
